title: galium pusillum var. tendae
intro: Galium pusillum var. tendae is a lesser-known variety of the small-flowered bedstraw plant, a type of flowering plant in the madder family (Rubiaceae). Traditionally, Galium pusillum var. tendae has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Galium pusillum var. tendae is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
